title: Automation to Remove Duplicates in contacts
excerpt:
Hi 
I am struggling with when new leads move to contacts, if that contact is already exist, it should notify for duplicate contacts. 
please help

posts.author: Aysha1 (Aysha Mohammad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I am struggling with when new leads move to contacts, if that contact is already exist, it should notify for duplicate contacts.
please help

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Aysha1 - duplicate functionality is only available in the monday CRM product. There are some 3rd party apps in the marketplace that can assist with this - we have used the Kolaai product before and it works quite well.

Hope this helps,
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mark.anley Thanks for the recommendation.

@Aysha1 Like alreay mentioned, the Duplicates and Uniques app can help you out here.

Here is a demo of how to automatically identify duplicates.

If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
